It is a genus of flowering plants in the sunflower family, commonly known as sneezeweed or false sneezeweed. 

Helenium (Sneezeweed) is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helenium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support respiratory health.

The bioactive constituents of Helenium include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and triterpenoid saponins. These compounds are responsible for the plant's medicinal properties and are found in its leaves, flowers, and roots.

The most common herbal preparations made with Helenium include teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, flu, and respiratory infections.
